title: Photon - Fullbright
description: A simple Full Bright texturepack for Vanilla, Sodium and Optifine
body:
**Tired of darkness in Minecraft?** Photon is a lightweight FullBright resource pack that makes caves, interiors, and dark areas fully visible in Minecraft while preserving the vanilla visual style. ---

***

--- ## Features - FullBright visibility in caves, interiors, and underwater areas - Maintains vanilla lighting style with no artificial glow effects - Lightweight client-side resource pack - Compatible with Vanilla, OptiFine and Sodium-based setups (version dependent) --- ## Why Photon? Darkness in Minecraft limits exploration and slows gameplay. Photon removes visual barriers while keeping the game’s original look intact, giving clear visibility without introducing mods or shaders. --- ## Overview ### Screenshots | Photon | Vanilla| |--------|--------| | | | | [View Full Size](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3d054b3bc8e1312780ee268eae152cd9a125ecd.jpeg) | [View Full Size](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c95cba84a3e972e4f7319efac6bacd33362c1f9_0.webp) | --- ## Requirements | Branch | Minecraft Version | Forge | Fabric | Vanilla | |--------------|------------------|----------------------|----------------------|--------------------| | Legacy | 1.6 → 1.12.2 | ⚠️ OptiFine required | ❌ Not supported | ❌ Not supported | | Legacy+ | 1.13 → 1.16.5 | ⚠️ OptiFine required | ❌ Not supported | ❌ Not supported | | Reforged | 1.17 → 1.21.11 | ⚠️ OptiFine required | ❌ Not supported | ❌ Not supported | | Photon 3.1 | 26.x+ | ✔ Supported | ✔ Supported | ✔ Supported | --- ## Technical ### Installation 1. Download the ZIP file 2. Place it in your Minecraft `resourcepacks` folder 3. Enable it from the Resource Pack menu --- ### Compatibility - Works with vanilla Minecraft gameplay - For Vanilla, Sodium, and Optifine compatibility, refer to the Requirements section above - May conflict with packs that modify lightmaps or shader behavior - Turns itself off when using shaders --- ### Tags fullbright, brightness, cave visibility, minecraft lighting, optifine fullbright, sodium compatible, vanilla lighting, night vision alternative, resource pack utility, photon, precisionzero --- ### Contact For any concerns regarding Hydron, contact me at: precisionzero.creator@gmail.com --- ### License All Rights Reserved
